title: The Trial of the Mantis Warrior

curation.synopsis: In the bitter aftermath of the Badab War, the Mantis Warriors stand accused of treason against the Imperium. Their Chapter Master, Neotera, faces a panel of unseen judges, fellow Chapter Masters, Librarians and agents of the Inquisition, who will decide whether his brethren are traitors or merely the misled. As he relives the long road that led the Chapter astray, Neotera recalls how the Mantis Warriors were sent to investigate the renegade Astral Claws, how their lord Lugft Huron seduced them with talk of a corrupt Imperium, and the fateful moment that bound them to rebellion. Caught between defiance and remorse, Neotera wrestles with a question he cannot answer: were they ever truly guilty at all?

flags.reason: Roster lists format=novel, but sources show this is a short story from the Legends of the Space Marines anthology (2010), re-released as a standalone ebook in 2016.

flags.suggestion: The Trial of the Mantis Warriors
flags.reason: Roster title is singular ('Mantis Warrior'); the published title is plural ('Mantis Warriors').
